purpose: Interactive wizard to install, configure, and validate the platform.
Winget dependency resolver and layout builder.
Registers SCM registry values and sets environment paths.
Runs hardware check, ports bind check, and model inference test.
Bundles system data, configs, and containers into timestamped zip backups.
Orchestrates database restoration and handles DPAPI credential rekeying.
Copies files and updates directory paths across drives or partitions.
Creates a clean, shareable codebase package by excluding logs, cache, and secrets.
